(Office Apps)
Visit www.barcodelabeldesign.com website to install Barcode Labels Design Software that is helpful for designing stylish coupons, tags, labels, and assets by using flexible printing settings without any difficulty. item.title: Mac GSM SMS Gateways [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Mac GSM SMS Gateways [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: pctomobilesms1
item.itunes:summary:
Mac GSM SMS Gateways
(Chat & Messenging)
Mac GSM SMS Gateways tool transmits reminders. Mac GSM SMS Gateways software helps to send personalized text messages. Do you have any query about Mac bulk SMS solution? If yes, then download Mac GSM SMS Gateways software from www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com enables you to send share market updates across the world from GSM mobile connected Mac system. Want to deliver business notifications globally via GSM mobile connected PC? If yes, then use Mac GSM SMS Gateways software is available at www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com provides affordable manner to deliver airline, railway, telecom and other business industry related news in different text format from your Macintosh machine via GSM technology-based cell phone.

[read more]

item.title: Fingrom [Financial]
item.itunes:title: Fingrom [Financial]
item.itunes:author: vlyskouski
item.itunes:summary:
Fingrom
(Financial)
The goal of the solution is to create a financial accounting application that is intuitive, efficient, and inclusive.
That empowers users to effortlessly manage their finances while ensuring that no one is left behind.

Features:
- Accounting
- Budget Categories
- Bills, Transfers, Incomes (Invoices)
- Goals Definition
- Exchange rates
- Metrics
- Synchronization between devices (P2P)
- Recovery via WebDav or a direct File
- Import from CSV, QIF, OFX files for Bills and Invoices
- Data encryption
- Localization
- Responsive and Adaptive Design
- Shortcuts

If you would like to come with suggestions, report bugs, translate the app, or contribute otherwise, feel free to reach out!

This is the "open-source code" application that welcomes and values contributions from the community. However, there are some limitations when it comes to making external modifications and distributions, as it follows the CC-BY-NC-ND-4.0 license. As the project's author, I am committed to upholding the "Terms of Use" and "Privacy Policy" to ensure the well-being and satisfaction of all users across all platforms (desktop, mobile, and web).
[read more]
item.description:
Fingrom
(Financial)
The goal of the solution is to create a financial accounting application that is intuitive, efficient, and inclusive.
That empowers users to effortlessly manage their finances while ensuring that no one is left behind.

- Recovery via WebDav or a direct File

- Localization
- Responsive and Adaptive Design

If you would like to come with suggestions, report bugs, translate the app, or contribute otherwise, feel free to reach out!

This is the "open-source code" application that welcomes and values contributions from the community. However, there are some limitations when it comes to making external modifications and distributions, as it follows the CC-BY-NC-ND-4.0 license. As the project's author, I am committed to upholding the "Terms of Use" and "Privacy Policy" to ensure the well-being and satisfaction of all users across all platforms (desktop, mobile, and web).
[read more]

Fingrom
(Financial)
The goal of the solution is to create a financial accounting application that is intuitive, efficient, and inclusive.
That empowers users to effortlessly manage their finances while ensuring that no one is left behind.

- Accounting
- Budget Categories
- Bills, Transfers, Incomes (Invoices)
- Goals Definition
- Exchange rates
- Metrics
- Synchronization between devices (P2P)
- Recovery via WebDav or a direct File
- Import from CSV, QIF, OFX files for Bills and Invoices
- Data encryption
- Localization

If you would like to come with suggestions, report bugs, translate the app, or contribute otherwise, feel free to reach out!

This is the "open-source code" application that welcomes and values contributions from the community. However, there are some limitations when it comes to making external modifications and distributions, as it follows the CC-BY-NC-ND-4.0 license. As the project's author, I am committed to upholding the "Terms of Use" and "Privacy Policy" to ensure the well-being and satisfaction of all users across all platforms (desktop, mobile, and web).
[read more]

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:
RosarioSIS

RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.

Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.

RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.

item.title: GSM Bulk SMS Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: GSM Bulk SMS Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: pctomobilesms1
item.itunes:summary:
GSM Bulk SMS Software
(Chat & Messenging)
Comprehensive group message sender utility. Use GSM Bulk SMS Software to broadcast multiple numbers of notifications. Company website www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com presents GSM Bulk SMS Software that is helpful for common users to send unlimited personalized SMS to phones connected with computer. Free trial version of group messages transmitting program is available on www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com website to know about its working features for broadcasting of job alerts, news and advertisement via SMS messaging procedure. Cost effective GSM Bulk SMS Software offers facility to transmit wide range of messages from PC without need of specific SMS gateway.

[read more]

item.title: Bulk SMS Multi Mobile Phone [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Bulk SMS Multi Mobile Phone [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: bulksmsgroup
item.itunes:summary:
Bulk SMS Multi Mobile Phone
(Chat & Messenging)
Website provides mobile messaging software facilitates user to send bulk sms from global mobile services communication networks. Specialized mobile text sms application empowers users to deliver long messages from personal computer using GSM technology based cell phone devices. Proficient Bulk SMS Multi Mobile Phone program enables user to broadcast group messages from notebook without requiring internet connection. Provides mobile sms utility helps user to delivers sms for increasing brand value of products and increases traffic to your business. Website provides Bulk messaging software allows user to communicate with school and college friends, customers and relatives by using GSM mobile phone connected to PC. Download from www.bulksmsgroup.com bulk mobile text messaging program helps user to sends standard sms from laptop using GSM communication techniques. Company provides bulk sms application empowers user to broadcast unlimited messages and notification from computer machine using USB GSM based devices. Comprehensive mobile messaging utility allows user to send sms from computer via GSM cell phone having no internet connectivity. Company offer Bulk SMS USB application enables user to forwards sms from notebook by using multiple USB modem devices. Website offer bulk messaging provides simple and easy solution to broadcast multiple long text sms from PC using cell phone devices. Salient Features: * Professional Bulk messaging utility provides supports to all kinds of GSM mobile phone technologies. * Proficient bulk mobile text messaging software easily manages the list of all contact numbers using inbuilt list wizard techniques. * Comprehensive bulk text SMS program provides resuming facility to stop duplicate contact number entry during sms delivering process. * Specialized Bulk SMS Multi Mobile Phone tool facilitates user to save delivered sms. * Innovative Mobile Bulk SMS application provides facility to broadcast sms in entire Unicode languages.

[read more]

item.title: SMS Software for Modem [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: SMS Software for Modem [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: pctomobilesms1
item.itunes:summary:
SMS Software for Modem
(Chat & Messenging)
SMS delivery tool send free text. SMS Software for Modem utility used to forward unlimited bulk free messages. Visit our site www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com that provides SMS Software for Modem application used to deliver limitless free text from computer system connecting with USB modem to mobile phone. SMS Software for Modem program presented by www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com allow user to easily and quickly forward unlimited text regarding education, interview, birthday party etc from pc connecting with multi-USB modem to friend's cell phone residing in any part of the world. Do you want to communicate with friends and family members by sending free messages just visit us on www.pctomobilesmsgateways.com that provides flexible, cost effective, and reliable SMS Software for Modem tool that used to deliver bulk text from laptop, desktop, pc connecting with USB modem and without internet connection.

[read more]

item.title: Bulk SMS Android [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Bulk SMS Android [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: bulksmsgroup
item.itunes:summary:
Bulk SMS Android
(Chat & Messenging)
Company offer bulk text messaging program helps user to composed and send thousands of sms from android cell phone using over global communication networks. Website provides bulk messaging utility empowers user to forward birthday greeting, invitation sms, meeting alert to all friends, clients and relatives from notebook using android phone communication networks. Comprehensive Bulk SMS Android application helps user to delivers long text messages from Personal Computer by using android technology based mobile phones. Proficient bulk sms software allows user to record and view delivers messages. Website offer bulk text messages application facilitates user to compose and broadcast long standard messages from laptop via android USB mobile phone devices. Specialized android text messaging tool helps user to increases business activities by forwarding text sms alert of products and services from PC using android mobile phone without requiring internet. Company provides bulk sms application empowers user to delivers messages in English and all other languages. Provides bulk messages utility facilitates user to promote business sales of products in mobile marketing from computer system using android cell phone devices. Website provides Bulk SMS mobile software provides easy and cost effective solution for promoting business from computer system using android mobile phones.Salient Features: *Professional Bulk messaging utility supports to all brands Android mobile phones. *Innovative Mobile Bulk SMS application provides support to all Unicode languages text formats. *Proficient bulk text messaging program provides inbuilt list wizard option to manage entire contact numbers while sending sms. *Comprehensive bulk text messages software facilitates user to skip duplicate contact numbers entry during sms forwarding process. *Specialized Bulk SMS Android tool provides support to all contact numbers saved in text or excel file formats during message delivering.

[read more]
